sentence_reviews.text: Hidden portions of an input are predicted from visible context; it operationally connects Self-supervised learning and Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: BERT abstract lines 37-39 describes bidirectional pretraining from unlabeled text and conditioning on left and right context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Masked-token prediction from context is supported; the explicit graph connection to token/vocabulary units is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Masked prediction objectives is to connect Self-supervised learning, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units to downstream capabilities including Large-scale pretraining, Encoder-only bidirectional transformers, Diffusion and masked-generative language models.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: BERT abstract lines 37-40; PML landing page lines 45-48 for broad ML context.
sentence_reviews.notes: BERT supports pretraining and bidirectional encoder use, but diffusion and masked-generative language models are not directly supported by the inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: BERT title and abstract lines 31 and 37-40 describe pre-training of deep bidirectional transformers from unlabeled text.
sentence_reviews.notes: BERT is a direct example of masked-objective pretraining.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: BERT abstract lines 37-39 describes deep bidirectional representations conditioned on both left and right context.
sentence_reviews.notes: BERT is the canonical encoder-style bidirectional transformer pretraining objective.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Diffusion and masked-generative language models
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML landing page lines 45-48 describes modern ML coverage, but inspected source does not directly mention diffusion language objectives.
sentence_reviews.notes: The inspected sources for this packet do not support the diffusion and masked-generative language model example exactly.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: BERT abstract lines 37-40 supports unlabeled-text pretraining and downstream evaluation; it does not directly state the surrogate limitation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are partially supported; limitation wording requires a direct source.

sentence_reviews.text: Masked prediction objectives uses Self-supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: BERT abstract lines 37-39 describes pretraining from unlabeled text.
sentence_reviews.notes: Masked prediction derives training targets from the input itself, matching self-supervision.

sentence_reviews.text: Masked prediction objectives uses Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: BERT abstract lines 37-39 refers to language representations from unlabeled text and context-conditioned prediction.
sentence_reviews.notes: Token/vocabulary use is true for masked language modeling, though the abstract evidence is indirect.

sentence_reviews.text: Masked prediction objectives uses Images, video & spatial grids as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
